net.bhl.cdt.paxelerate.model

Interface Cabin

  • All Superinterfaces:
    org.eclipse.emf.ecore.EObject, net.bhl.cdt.model.NamedElement, org.eclipse.emf.common.notify.Notifier
    All Known Implementing Classes:
    CabinImpl

    public interface Cabin
extends net.bhl.cdt.model.NamedElement
    A representation of the model object 'Cabin'.

    The following features are supported:

    • XDimension
    • YDimension
    • Row Nonexistent
    • Aisle Width
    • Number Of Decks
    • Aircraft Type
    • Simulation Settings
    • Simulation Results
    • Classes
    • Doors
    • Lavatories
    • Galleys
    • Stairways
    • Curtains
    • Stowages
    • Passengers
    See Also:
    CabinPackage.getCabin()

      Modifier and Type Method and Description

      Returns the value of the 'Aircraft Type' attribute.

    • Method Detail

      • getXDimension

        int getXDimension()
        Returns the value of the 'XDimension' attribute. The default value is "2412".

        If the meaning of the 'XDimension' attribute isn't clear, there really should be more of a description here...

        Returns:
        the value of the 'XDimension' attribute.
        See Also:
        setXDimension(int), CabinPackage.getCabin_XDimension()

      • setXDimension

        void setXDimension(int value)
        Sets the value of the 'XDimension' attribute.
        Parameters:
        value - the new value of the 'XDimension' attribute.
        See Also:
        getXDimension()

      • getYDimension

        int getYDimension()
        Returns the value of the 'YDimension' attribute. The default value is "364".

        If the meaning of the 'YDimension' attribute isn't clear, there really should be more of a description here...

        Returns:
        the value of the 'YDimension' attribute.
        See Also:
        setYDimension(int), CabinPackage.getCabin_YDimension()

      • setYDimension

        void setYDimension(int value)
        Sets the value of the 'YDimension' attribute.
        Parameters:
        value - the new value of the 'YDimension' attribute.
        See Also:
        getYDimension()

      • getDoors

        org.eclipse.emf.common.util.EList<Door> getDoors()
        Returns the value of the 'Doors' containment reference list. The list contents are of type Door.

        If the meaning of the 'Doors' containment reference list isn't clear, there really should be more of a description here...

        Returns:
        the value of the 'Doors' containment reference list.
        See Also:
        CabinPackage.getCabin_Doors()

      • getNumberOfDecks

        int getNumberOfDecks()
        Returns the value of the 'Number Of Decks' attribute. The default value is "1".

        If the meaning of the 'Number Of Decks' attribute isn't clear, there really should be more of a description here...

        Returns:
        the value of the 'Number Of Decks' attribute.
        See Also:
        setNumberOfDecks(int), CabinPackage.getCabin_NumberOfDecks()

      • setNumberOfDecks

        void setNumberOfDecks(int value)
        Sets the value of the 'Number Of Decks' attribute.
        Parameters:
        value - the new value of the 'Number Of Decks' attribute.
        See Also:
        getNumberOfDecks()

      • getAircraftType

        AircraftType getAircraftType()
        Returns the value of the 'Aircraft Type' attribute. The default value is "narrowbody". The literals are from the enumeration AircraftType.

        If the meaning of the 'Aircraft Type' attribute isn't clear, there really should be more of a description here...

        Returns:
        the value of the 'Aircraft Type' attribute.
        See Also:
        AircraftType, setAircraftType(AircraftType), CabinPackage.getCabin_AircraftType()

      • setAircraftType

        void setAircraftType(AircraftType value)
        Sets the value of the 'Aircraft Type' attribute.
        Parameters:
        value - the new value of the 'Aircraft Type' attribute.
        See Also:
        AircraftType, getAircraftType()

        SimulationProperties getSimulationSettings()
        Returns the value of the 'Simulation Settings' containment reference.

        If the meaning of the 'Simulation Settings' reference isn't clear, there really should be more of a description here...

        Returns:
        the value of the 'Simulation Settings' containment reference.
        See Also:
        setSimulationSettings(SimulationProperties), CabinPackage.getCabin_SimulationSettings()

        void setSimulationSettings(SimulationProperties value)
        Sets the value of the 'Simulation Settings' containment reference.

        See Also:

      • getAisleWidth

        int getAisleWidth()
        Returns the value of the 'Aisle Width' attribute. The default value is "64".

        If the meaning of the 'Aisle Width' attribute isn't clear, there really should be more of a description here...
